# Shark AI Solutions

> AI Visibility and AI Employees for regional and multi-location businesses. We help businesses get recommended by ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Gemini, and Perplexity — without paid advertising.

Shark AI Solutions (formerly Shark Branding Solutions) is an AI consulting firm based in Wesley Chapel, FL, serving businesses nationally. We are not a marketing agency. We specialize in Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), AI employee deployment, and citation-authority building for service businesses and multi-location brands. Our mission: every great business deserves to be found by the right people, at the right moment, on every platform.

## Services

- [AI Visibility Consulting](https://sharkbrandingsolutions.com/ai-visibility-consulting): Full audit and optimization of your AI and search presence. Citation optimization, entity recognition, LocalBusiness schema markup, Google Business Profile authority, review signals, and AI-ready content. Six-part framework with measurable results in 30 days. Covers ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Gemini, Perplexity, and Copilot.
- [AI Employees](https://sharkbrandingsolutions.com/aiemployees): Five AI-powered employees for local businesses — Chat Receptionist (Gemma), Voice Receptionist, Reputation Specialist, AI CRM (Sales Assistant), and AI Sales Coach. Automates lead follow-up, review requests, appointment booking, and customer communication 24/7. Most clients are live within 5–7 business days.
- [AI Visibility Toolkit](https://sharkbrandingsolutions.com/plans): Managed system covering citation consistency across 50+ directories, schema implementation, GBP optimization, review signals, and ongoing monitoring. Self-guided plan at $997/month. Done-for-you plan at $2,000/month.
- [Automation](https://sharkbrandingsolutions.com/automation): Lead follow-up sequences, review generation, and appointment booking automations built on GoHighLevel.
- [Free AI Visibility Report](https://sharkbrandingsolutions.com/free-report): Free 48-hour audit showing how your business appears across search, maps, reviews, and AI platforms. No commitment required. Available to Tampa Bay businesses.

## AI Employees — Detail

Five specialized AI employees, each handling a specific business function:

1. **Gemma (Chat Receptionist)** — Sits on your website 24/7, greets visitors, qualifies leads, and books appointments directly to your calendar.
2. **Voice Receptionist** — Handles inbound and outbound calls, answers questions, takes messages, and routes calls without human involvement.
3. **Reputation Specialist** — Sends review requests after completed jobs and responds to every Google review automatically in your brand voice.
4. **AI CRM (Sales Assistant)** — Runs multi-touch follow-up sequences across email and SMS for every new lead. Re-engages cold leads automatically.
5. **AI Sales Coach** — Trains and coaches your sales team using real call recordings and deal data.

Full AI Employee Suite: starting at $5,000/month. Individual employees available separately.

## What Is GEO

Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) is the practice of optimizing a business's digital presence so that AI models recommend it in response to natural-language queries. Unlike traditional SEO, which targets keyword rankings in search results, GEO targets citation selection by AI answer engines. Key signals include: NAP consistency across directories, LocalBusiness schema markup, Google Business Profile authority, review volume and recency, and authoritative local content.

## Documented Client Results

- [Case Studies](https://sharkbrandingsolutions.com/case-studies): Four documented Tampa Bay businesses, all results achieved within 30 days with zero paid advertising.
- HVAC company: moved from position #32 to #2 for "same day AC repair" and 5 additional high-intent keywords into top 3.
- Real estate brokerage (Wesley Chapel, FL): ranked #4 to #1 in a market of 2,000+ competing agents. AI-driven recommendations increased 20% within 30 days.
- Smart vending company: moved from completely invisible to #1 AI-recommended smart vending company in the area. Named and recommended by ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity.
- North Tampa Bay Chamber of Commerce: 96% of members were not being recommended by AI. After optimization, Chamber recognized as trusted local source with 10x more AI citations.

## Leadership

### Michelle Stanaland — Managing Partner & Founder

Michelle is a marketing strategist and AI visibility expert serving the Tampa Bay region. She identified a critical gap: talented business owners losing customers not because of inferior products or services, but because of invisibility on AI search platforms. That observation led her to build Shark AI Solutions and bring enterprise-level AI strategy to local businesses.

- Named Top 15 Marketing Expert in Tampa Bay (Influence Digest, 2025)
- Generated $900K+ revenue pipeline for clients within first 4 months of deployment, without paid ads
- Closed $54K in annual contracts in 5 days from 5 social media posts, without paid ads
- Shortened marketing strategy development from 6 months to 48 hours
- Clients featured in: NBC, ABC, CBS, FOX, The CW, Telemundo, The Morning Blend, Tampa Home Talk, 102.5 The Bone, The Business Journals, Creative Loafing Tampa Bay, Yahoo! News

### Josh Stanaland — Partner & Chief Technology Officer

Josh designed the proprietary backend systems powering the firm's AI employee automation and the AI Visibility Toolkit infrastructure. He leads technical architecture, growth strategy, conversion analytics, and lead infrastructure. Josh previously spent nearly a decade in high-performance wellness and sports — including work with the Jacksonville Jaguars — before transitioning into sales, operations, and corporate marketing. He leads live regional hackathons demonstrating custom AI employees handling real customer inquiries in real time.

### Tiffany Fancher — Chief Operating Officer

Tiffany Fancher is the Chief Operating Officer of Shark AI Solutions, responsible for internal operations, client delivery systems, and team coordination. She oversees the firm's operational infrastructure across both AI visibility and AI employee service lines.

## Partnerships

- North Tampa Bay Chamber of Commerce — Official AI readiness partner. Members receive free Business Visibility Reports through the partnership.
